entities.summary: Converts logits to token IDs via temperature and top-p sampling

detail.name: Sampler
detail.description: Applies temperature scaling and nucleus (top-p) filtering before sampling from probability distribution.

teaches.explain: Divide logits by temperature before softmax. T<1 = sharper (more deterministic). T>1 = flatter (more random). T=0 = argmax.
teaches.rationale: Applies temperature scaling and nucleus (top-p) filtering before sampling from probability distribution

teaches.explain: Sort by probability, keep smallest set whose cumulative probability ≥ p. Dynamically adjusts candidate pool size.
teaches.rationale: Applies temperature scaling and nucleus (top-p) filtering before sampling from probability distribution

entities.summary: Apply temperature, top-p filter, then sample token from distribution

detail.name: forward
detail.description: Pipeline: logits → temperature scale → softmax → top-p mask → multinomial sample → token ID.

teaches.explain: Draw from categorical distribution defined by probabilities. torch.multinomial samples indices weighted by input probabilities.
teaches.rationale: Pipeline: logits → temperature scale → softmax → top-p mask → multinomial sample → token ID
